testcase.name: test_update_global_discount
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_preventivi_v2.py:544: in test_update_global_discount assert updated_totals['sconto_val'] == 30.00, f"Expected sconto_val=30, got {updated_totals['sconto_val']}" E AssertionError: Expected sconto_val=30, got 0 E assert 0 == 30.0

testcase.name: test_update_acconto
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_preventivi_v2.py:576: in test_update_acconto assert updated_totals['acconto'] == 50.00, f"Expected acconto=50, got {updated_totals['acconto']}" E AssertionError: Expected acconto=50, got 0.0 E assert 0.0 == 50.0

testcase.name: test_convert_with_prezzo_netto
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_preventivi_v2.py:627: in test_convert_with_prezzo_netto assert invoice_response.status_code == 200 E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_convert_with_payment_type
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_preventivi_v2.py:665: in test_convert_with_payment_type assert invoice_response.status_code == 200 E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_convert_with_global_discount

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected taxable~180, got None assert 180.0 < 1 + where 180.0 = abs((0 - 180.0)) + where 0 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb3f9b154e40>('taxable_amount', 0) + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb3f9b154e40> = {'cassa': 0.0, 'ritenuta': 0.0, 'rivalsa_inps': 0.0, 'subtotal': 200.0, ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_preventivi_v2.py:711: in test_convert_with_global_discount assert abs(inv_totals.get('taxable_amount', 0) - 180.00) < 1, f"Expected taxable~180, got {inv_totals.get('taxable_amount')}" E AssertionError: Expected taxable~180, got None E assert 180.0 < 1 E + where 180.0 = abs((0 - 180.0)) E + where 0 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb3f9b154e40>('taxable_amount', 0) E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb3f9b154e40> = {'cassa': 0.0, 'ritenuta': 0.0, 'rivalsa_inps': 0.0, 'subtotal': 200.0, ...}.get
